title: Ikkuthe kangal vikkuthe lyrics Vithagan Song lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Hariharan, Shreya Ghoshal
Song: Ikkudhe kangal vikkudhe
Movie: Vithagan
Lyrics: R Parthiban
Music: Johsua Sridhar

Ikkudhe kangal vikkudhe
eeram sotta mutham thaaraayo
Ittudhe vekkam muttudhe
neeyum thatpa vetpam theerpaayo..(2)

Attaiyaai ottiye, unarchiyai urunjiye
verum sakkaiyaai saaigiren
nee thupidum paarvaiyaal......

Adhigaalai seidhith thaal pole
nuzhaindhaaye..kathavooram ohh..
Nizhal thaane ena naan nadandhene
thodarndhaaye.. azhagaaga

Nizhalukkum puvi eerpu visai kondaaye
Midhakum nilai tharai meedhe naan kondene
Anbu vedika vaitha ennai ilakka seidha
kanne kanni vedi kunde

Pudavaikul oru porkalam
kor aayudhangal oraayirame ivalidam
Velvadho madi veezhvadho
poriduvadhe perinbame perunthavam

Irutaakum unnal minvettai..
anaithaaye.. mani neram ohh
Minsaram urpathi seidhom yeraalam,
Idhalloram ...

Kavanam kol kanidhathil ennai kolladhe
kanakindri vazhakindri inbam thuvaipome
Maru kannam kaati mutham vaangi thinnum
sirumai kaadhal penne........... (Ikkudhe kangal)

Attaiyaai ottiye, unarchiyai urunjiye
verum sakkaiyaai saaigiren
nee thupidum paarvaiyaal......

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Ikkuthe Kangal Vikkuthe?

The song explores themes of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics and melody.

Who are the singers of this song?

Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal lend their voices to this melodious track.

Who composed the music for Vithagan?

The music for the movie was composed by Joshua Sridhar.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song adds depth to the romantic narrative, highlighting the emotional connection between the characters.

When was the movie Vithagan released?

The movie was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ikkuthe Kangal Vikkuthe from Vithagan is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the talented Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal, the melody is soothing and evocative, perfectly complemented by Parthiban's heartfelt lyrics. Joshua Sridhar's music adds an enchanting layer to the song, making it a memorable piece in the film. The song plays a significant role in portraying the emotional bond between the lead characters, evoking feelings of romance and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful blend of Ikkuthe Kangal Vikkuthe from the movie Vithagan, where Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal's voices weave magic. With Joshua Sridhar's enchanting music and Parthiban's poignant lyrics, this song captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of emotions with this unforgettable melody.
stanzaMeanings: Eyes are closing, eyes are blinking, will you give a wet kiss? Shyness is leaving, hesitation is melting, will you ease this heat?
I am sticking to you, feeling you deeply, becoming just a shell because of your piercing gaze.
You entered like the morning dew, oh at the door... I walked thinking I was a shadow, you followed beautifully.
You have the attraction of gravity even for shadows. I have taken a step on this ground. You aimed at me with love, like a firecracker.
In the saree, there is a battlefield, with a thousand weapons. Winning or losing, fighting is the greatest joy and penance.
You make the darkness a lightning hunt, all the time, oh... We created electricity in abundance, around this...
Pay attention, don't trap me in sweetness. Let's enjoy without dreams or rules. Show the other cheek, take a kiss, oh young love girl...
I am sticking to you, feeling you deeply, becoming just a shell because of your piercing gaze.
